question: Find the title of books which are ordered by client Peter Doe but not client James Smith.
sql: SELECT Title FROM Book WHERE ISBN IN (SELECT ISBN FROM Books_Order WHERE IdOrder IN (SELECT IdOrder FROM Orders WHERE IdClient = '0000001P')) AND ISBN NOT IN (SELECT ISBN FROM Books_Order WHERE IdOrder IN (SELECT IdOrder FROM Orders WHERE IdClient = '0000002P'));

back_translation.intent: 查询特定客户未订购的书籍标题
filters: ISBN IN (SELECT ISBN FROM Books_Order WHERE IdOrder IN (SELECT IdOrder FROM Orders WHERE IdClient = '0000001P'))
ISBN NOT IN (SELECT ISBN FROM Books_Order WHERE IdOrder IN (SELECT IdOrder FROM Orders WHERE IdClient = '0000002P'))

semantic.reason: 语义一致，SQL反向翻译描述准确表达了原始问题中'客户Peter Doe订购的书籍但James Smith未订购'的意图，且涉及的表、列和过滤条件均符合要求。
